name: com.daxoom/daxoom
description: Authoritative, owner-verified business data for AI agents. Search, full profiles, hours, offerings and prices, attributes, owner Q&A, and AI-grounding context — every response carries provenance (verification level, completeness, freshness, sources). 12 tools + 5 resources.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Daxoom API key (dxm_ prefix). Free Developer tier (3,000 queries/month) at https://daxoom.com/developer.
